taxonomy: Tonsella paniculata is a species of fungus in the family Ctenellaceae. It belongs to the genus Tonsella and is classified as a type of rust fungus. The classification of Tonsella paniculata is further broken down into its kingdom (Fungi), phylum (Basidiomycota), and order (Puccinellates). This classification suggests that Tonsella paniculata is closely related to other rust fungi in the same family and order. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
